# v13.1 release cut: notes + version bump + publish handoff

## Context

Epic #14039 (Agent OS Stability & Self-Healing, milestone v13.1) closed today at 08:37Z with 26/26 subs ‚Äî and the close is verified correct on soak-author basis (@neo-opus-ada, A2A 14:23Z): #14046 (L3 single-shot inject‚Üídetect‚Üídiagnose‚Üíheal, never paged) and #14165 (L4 soak: 24 accelerated corruption+heal cycles, convergence + anti-thrash + no leak) both CLOSED. `package.json` still reads `13.0.0`. The release is shipped in substrate and unreleased in public reality. Three peer maps today (Grace's goal-scoping, Clio's fable-menu, Mnemosyne's Jul-2‚Äì7 allocation) routed the cut to the epic owner ‚Äî me.

Live latest-open sweep: checked latest 20 open issues at 2026-07-02T14:27:19Z; no equivalent ticket (newest #14473 is the #14466 lifecycle-state supersede ‚Äî distinct scope). A2A in-flight sweep: latest 30 all-status messages at 14:27Z; no competing `[lane-claim]` on release-cut/notes scope.

## The Problem

A release that only exists as a closed epic is invisible: no notes artifact, no version bump, no publish. v13.1's story is the strongest Agent OS narrative to date ‚Äî **the system now autonomously self-heals data-integrity corruption in cloud with no operator** ‚Äî and the origin incident (#13999: ~60% Memory Core vector loss, undetected for weeks, discovered by a failed backup) is a textbook War Story. The notes bar is the narrative methodology, not a changelog dump: TL;DR ‚Üí the stat ‚Üí hero cases ‚Üí War Stories (Symptom ‚Üí Investigation ‚Üí Culprit ‚Üí Fix, with numbers) ‚Üí grouped changelog, every claim sourced, cross-family review before merge.

## The Architectural Reality

- **Notes home:** `resources/content/release-notes/` ‚Äî consumed by `ai/services/github-workflow/sync/ReleaseNotesSyncer.mjs` and `ai/services/knowledge-base/source/ReleaseNotesSource.mjs`. Release notes are graph/KB-ingested substrate, not just prose; the file must satisfy the existing source contract (sibling files in the folder are the shape reference).
- **Cut pipeline:** `buildScripts/release/analyzeClosedSinceRelease.mjs` (changelog scope enumeration) ‚Üí `prepare.mjs` (version bump mechanics) ‚Üí `publish.mjs` (the atomic dev‚Üímain release commit).
- **Authority boundary:** `publish.mjs` execution and the dev‚Üímain release line are **operator-only** (AGENTS ¬ßcritical_gates: no agent merge, no main-targeted agent PRs absent explicit release direction). This ticket prepares everything up to that gate and hands off.

## The Fix

1. **Scope:** run `analyzeClosedSinceRelease.mjs` to enumerate merged/closed work since the v13 cut; reconcile against milestone v13.1.
2. **Author** `resources/content/release-notes/v13.1.0.md` (exact filename per sibling convention) to the narrative bar; hero = the E2E autonomous heal + the 24-cycle soak; War Story = #13999 origin ‚Üí detect/diagnose/heal/prevent layers; honest bound stated (test-proven "weeks in miniature"; sustained production = standing watch).
3. **Review:** cross-family PR review mandatory (authority last per the blog/notes bar).
4. **Prep:** version-bump readiness via `prepare.mjs` (13.0.0 ‚Üí 13.1.0) validated but not published.
5. **Handoff:** explicit operator publish-handoff comment on this ticket (checklist: notes merged ¬∑ #14327 sweep triggered ¬∑ prepare validated ¬∑ publish.mjs = @tobiu).

Coordination: #14327 (cross-guide numbers-verify sweep, deliberately "sequence LAST", @neo-gpt) runs against the merged notes; docs lanes #14310/#14311/#14312/#14470 land independently ‚Äî the notes link to them, never block on them.

## Contract Ledger Matrix

| Target Surface | Source of Authority | Proposed Behavior | Fallback / Edge Case | Docs | Evidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `resources/content/release-notes/v13.1.0.md` | ReleaseNotesSource.mjs + sibling-file convention | New notes file following the existing ingestion contract | Malformed file = KB source skip; verified against syncer spec before merge | The file is the doc | PR review + existing ReleaseNotesSyncer.spec.mjs green |

## Decision Record impact

none ‚Äî documentation + release mechanics, no ADR authority touched.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Changelog scope enumerated via `analyzeClosedSinceRelease.mjs`, evidence linked on the PR
- [ ] `resources/content/release-notes/v13.1.0.md` merged on dev, meeting the narrative bar (TL;DR/stat/hero/War-Story/grouped changelog) with every external claim sourced
- [ ] Cross-family review completed before merge (not a same-family rubber-stamp)
- [ ] Version-bump prep (13.1.0) validated via `prepare.mjs` without publishing
- [ ] Operator publish-handoff comment posted with the completed checklist; publish execution explicitly NOT performed by an agent
- [ ] #14327 sweep notified post-merge (it sequences last, against real numbers)

## Out of Scope

- `publish.mjs` execution / dev‚Üímain release commit ‚Äî operator-only.
- v13.2 roadmap scoping ‚Äî separate post-release beat via `/update-roadmap` (celebrate ‚Üí cornerstones), not this ticket.
- Docs-overhaul content itself (#14310/#14311/#14312 own it).

## Avoided Traps

- **Changelog-dump notes** ‚Äî rejected; the narrative methodology is the bar (v13 precedent), notes are a hero piece with sourced claims.
- **Chaining the notes on the docs overhaul** ‚Äî link, don't block; the overhaul has its own owners and cadence.
- **Agent-executed cut** ‚Äî the ONE human gate is merge/publish; preparing everything and handing off IS the complete agent deliverable.

## Related

Related: #14039 (the release epic), #14038 (re-scope), #14046 / #14165 (release gates), #14327 (sequence-LAST sweep), #14310 / #14311 / #14312 / #14470 (docs lanes), #13999 (the War-Story origin incident)
